column1: # Rename this file to <pump_id>.csv (e.g. P001.csv) before filling in data.
# The pump_id stem must match a row in pump_catalog.csv.
#   - Each is a power level in WATTS (numeric only
#   - Include every distinct power level from the manufacturer datasheet
#   - Include the full range from minimum to shutoff head
#   - At least 2 rows are required for interpolation
#   - Rows may be in any order — the loader sorts them
#   - Achievable flow in US GPM at that (head
#   - Use 0.0 at or above shutoff head (pump delivers no flow)
#   - Do NOT leave cells blank — fill all cells
# See SCHEMA.md in this directory for full documentation.
